headline: Reframing The Veeva Systems (VEEV) Narrative As Mixed Analyst Views Meet Strong Execution
summary: Veeva Systems is back in focus after its fair value estimate was trimmed from US$302.60 to US$270.93, a roughly 10% reset that reflects more measured assumptions in the underlying model. That change lines up with a more mixed analyst backdrop, where many firms are cutting price targets while still pointing to solid Q4 execution and strong profitability, and a smaller group is leaning positive on Veeva’s role in life sciences software and AI. As you read on, you will see how different analysts...
